Notice Of Motion For (A) Dismissal Of Action For Failure To Bring To Trial Withing Five (5) Years Pursuant To Ccp 583 & 583.030: (B) Release Of Funds Held By Clerk To Pltf Romero De La Vega; (C) Judgm
Off Calendar May-25-2004 Continued To Jun-28-04 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Lawrence D. Murray, Esq., Murray & Associates (415) 673-0555 for Plaintiff and Moving Party Dela Vega
Karen E. Kirby, Deputy City Attorney and Frank Agnost, Deputy City Attorney (415) 554-3891 for Defendant and Opposing Party City and County of San Francisco
RULING:
A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF ROMEO DELA VEGA Notice Of Motion For (A) Dismissal Of Action For Failure To Bring To Trial Within Five (5) Years Pursuant To CCP 583 & 583.030: (B) Release Of Funds Held By Clerk To Plaintiff Romero De La Vega; (C) Judgment Of Dismissal, Or Alternatively Judgment Pursuant To CCP 664.5, 664.6 is CONTINUED to 06/28/04 in Dept. 301. Counsel shall submit simultaneous supplemental briefs no later than 06/14/04; simultaneous reply briefs shall be submitted no later than 06/17/04. Counsel shall provide courtesy copies to Dept. 301. (301/JLW/DS) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
